---

## Agenda

### 1. Welcome & Introductions (5 min)
- Brief round of introductions if any attendees are new to each other.
- Review meeting objectives and ground rules.

### 2. Project Overview (10 min)
- Problem statement and business context.
- Project goals and measurable success metrics.
- Scope: what is **in** and what is **out of** scope.

### 3. Roles & Responsibilities (5 min)
- Review the [Roles & RACI Matrix](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md).
- Confirm single accountable owner (PM) and product owner (PdM).
- Identify any gaps in team coverage.

### 4. High-Level Timeline & Milestones (10 min)
- Walk through key milestones and target dates.
- Flag any known constraints or hard deadlines.
- Agree on sprint/iteration length.

### 5. Risks, Assumptions & Dependencies (10 min)
- Review initial risks in the [Risk Register (RAID)](risk-register-template.md).
- Surface assumptions that need validation.
- Identify known external dependencies.

### 6. Communication & Cadence (5 min)
- Confirm meeting schedule (standups, weekly sync, demos).
- Agree on the primary communication channel (Slack / Teams / email).
- Confirm where project docs and the single source of truth will live.

### 7. GitHub Issues & Project Board Setup (5 min)
- Walk through the GitHub Project board columns: Backlog → Ready → In Progress → In Review → QA → Done.
- Confirm how issues will be labelled, estimated, and assigned.
- Point to [Execution & Tracking](../octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md) for full guidance.

### 8. Definition of Ready & Definition of Done (5 min)
- Review the [DoR / DoD Checklist](definition-of-ready-done-checklist.md).
- Agree on any project-specific additions.

### 9. Questions, Open Items & Next Steps (10 min)
- Capture open questions in the [Decision Log](decision-log-template.md).
- Assign owners and due dates to all action items.
- Confirm date of next check-in.
